message:
fix(determinism): sort collections before hashing for reproducible results

HashMap/HashSet iteration order is non-deterministic in Rust, which caused
content hashes to vary across runs despite identical logical state. Fix by
collecting into sorted BTreeMap/Vec before computing hashes:

- benchmark_evidence_bundle: sort evidence entries before hash
- calibration_sentinel: sort calibration records before fingerprint
- counterfactual_intervention_planner: sort intervention plans
- catastrophe_witness_generator: sort witness attestations
- frankenlab_gap_matrix: sort gap entries before matrix hash
- native_addon_parity_gate: sort addon parity records
- novelty_scoring_contract: sort novelty scores before digest
- metadata_substrate_governance: sort substrate metadata entries
- regexp_string_governance: sort regexp governance entries

All hashes are now deterministic across execution orderings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
